title: Kai Cenat’s Streamer University event draws massive crowds and chaos in NYC
summary_full: Kai Cenat's Streamer University event in New York City saw huge crowds. Aspiring content creators gathered for the free event. Many fans waited overnight for a chance to apply. Police managed the large turnout. This event is the first of three planned by Cenat. The massive response shows the popularity of Cenat and his initiative.
